title: Frontendutvecklare med intresse för UX
description:
Vill du jobba med teknik i framkant, samtidigt som du bidrar till samhällsnyttan? Hos oss får du intressanta arbetsuppgifter i samhällets hjärta, kombinerat med utvecklingsmöjligheter och balans mellan arbete och fritid. Var med och gör samhället möjligt!

**Om jobbet**


Du arbetar med systemutveckling i ett agilt utvecklingsteam där ni tillsammans ansvarar för teamets leveranser samtidigt som ni ser till helheten och bidrar till ett väl fungerande samhälle. Ni arbetar tillsammans i hela utvecklingsprocessen – från analys och design till implementation, test och vidareutveckling. Du utvecklar i React och säkerställer god kodkvalitet genom kodgranskning, gemensamma kodprinciper och testning. Du bidrar till tekniska förbättringar samt utveckling av arbetssätt och arkitektur. Du delar kunskap och erfarenhet med både teamet och andra team.


Du kommer att ingå i ett team som utvecklar en central portal av tjänster riktade mot våra externa kunder för alla utvecklande team och de som sköter drift och driftmeddelanden av våra publika tjänster. Teamet förvaltar och vidareutvecklar också de oinloggade tjänster på vår webbplats och dess ramverk. Du kommer till oss i ett skede där vi renodlar våra tjänster, utforskar nya tekniker (både AI och traditionellt) och bygger för robusthet.


Vi arbetar enligt SAFe i ett utvecklingståg med andra team.


Hos oss får du möjlighet till ständig utveckling och lärande i arbetet. Vi jobbar aktivt med kompetens och teknikutveckling genom exempelvis innovationssprintar. Du har kunniga kollegor som du utbyter erfarenhet med och du kan utveckla både bred och spetskompetens hos oss. Tack vare att vi är en stor it-organisation kan vi erbjuda goda möjligheter till intern rörlighet. Det är viktigt för oss att du har balans mellan jobb och fritid och vi erbjuder bland annat flexibel arbetstid och möjlighet att jobba delvis hemifrån. Du får en friskvårdstimme i veckan och friskvårdsbidrag samt möjlighet att ingå i flera olika trivselengagemang lokalt på kontoret i Sundbyberg.


Skatteverkets it-avdelning arbetar aktivt för att främja en inkluderande arbetsplats som präglas av jämställdhet och mångfald där alla medarbetare får lika möjligheter att bidra och utvecklas. Läs mer på Jobba med it hos oss


Du tillhör it-avdelningen, med placering i Sundbyberg. Vi är 31 medarbetare på webbsektionen.

**Om dig**


För att göra ett bra jobb och trivas hos oss på Skatteverket behöver du vara lyhörd, tänka nytt och ta ansvar. I arbetet är gott omdöme och förståelse för rättssäkerhet och säkerhet viktigt. Du ska också leva upp till vår medarbetarpolicy.


I det här jobbet ska du:

* ha god samarbetsförmåga, vara hjälpsam och ha ett gott bemötande
* vara nyfiken, ha förmågan och viljan att lära dig nya saker
* vara flexibel och öppen för förändringar
* ha god problemlösningsförmåga, se mönster och kunna göra avgränsningar
* agera medvetet och professionellt utifrån en god självinsikt
* uttrycka dig väl i tal och skrift på svenska.


Du ska även ha:

* avslutad utbildning om minst 2 år inom it, systemvetenskap eller annan inriktning som arbetsgivaren bedömer likvärdig. Alternativt flerårig arbetserfarenhet som arbetsgivaren bedömer likvärdig
* minst 1 år aktuell och relevant arbetserfarenhet av systemutveckling med React eller liknande ramverk
* minst 1 år aktuell och relevant arbetserfarenhet i TypeScript
* minst 1 år aktuell och relevant arbetserfarenhet av att konsumera och integrera REST‑API:er
* minst 1 år aktuell och relevant arbetserfarenhet av att nyttja komponentbibliotek och återanvändande av komponenter.


Det är önskvärt att du har erfarenhet av frontendtestning som till exempel enhetstester, samt god kunskap om tillgänglighet enligt WCAG och användbarhetsprinciper. Det är även önskvärt att du har erfarenhet av system- och tjänstedesign samt erfarenhet av Figma.

**Bra att veta**


Anställningen är tillsvidare och kan inledas med provanställning i sex månader.


En anställning hos oss kan innebära placering i säkerhetsklass. En säkerhetsprövning med registerkontroll enligt säkerhetsskyddslagen (2018:585) kan därför komma att genomföras före beslut om anställning. För en del av våra arbetsuppgifter i säkerhetsklass krävs svenskt medborgarskap.


På skatteverket.se/jobb kan du exempelvis läsa om vår samhällsbärande roll, fördelarna med att jobba hos oss och hur det går till när du söker våra jobb.


När du ansöker bifogar du ditt cv. Vi använder inte personligt brev i våra rekryteringar och du ska därför inte bifoga det i din ansökan.


Välkommen med din ansökan!


Skatteverket har en samhällsbärande roll. Vårt arbete berör alla privatpersoner och företag och genom vårt uppdrag bidrar vi till ett väl fungerande samhälle. Vår utveckling är kunddriven och vi samverkar med andra för att skapa effektiva lösningar. Tillsammans gör vi samhället möjligt.

title: Product Developer to Regional Relevance - US market
description:
**Job Description** *An exciting opportunity has opened up for a Product Developer to join our Regional Relevance team at H&M, focusing on creating collections and campaigns tailored for the US market. This role offers the chance to make a strong impact on how we deliver fashion that resonates locally while staying true to our brand DNA.*

  



**WHAT YOU’LL DO**

In this role as a Product Developer, you will play an important part in the exciting process of shaping the H&M Women assortment. You will define and execute both short- and long-term strategies for your category, ensuring alignment with our overall assortment goals. Leveraging your fashion intelligence, salesmanship, and commercial insight, you’ll drive seasonal keys and act on emerging trends. You will continuously refine our product and component strategy to drive growth and profitability.


In this position you will drive initiatives forward, ensuring seamless execution and effective cross-team collaboration in a fast-paced environment. You will work alongside a talented team of a product manager, planner, designer, and pattern maker, as well as collaborating closely with the production team. With your strong passion for product and fashion, you will be essential in creating world-class products that are on-trend and resonate with our customers.

 **WHO YOU ARE**

Qualifications:

* 5+ years of experience from a similar role as Product Developer for garments, shoes or accessories
* Education in Textiles, Buying, or Product Development
* Proven track record in creating products for the womenswear customer with a great sense of fashion and impeccable taste
* A keen eye for current fashion trends with strong fashion intelligence
* A deep passion for products and product development
* Extensive material knowledge
* Driven, structured, and proactive in taking initiatives
* Salesmanship and results-oriented
* Excellent communication skills
* A strong team player with a flexible attitude
* Ability to identify opportunities, improvements, and efficient solutions

 **WHO WE ARE**


H&M Group is a global company of strong fashion brands and ventures. Our goal is to prove that there is no compromise between exceptional design, affordable prices, and sustainable solutions. We want to liberate fashion for the many, and our customers are at the heart of every decision we make.


We are made up of thousands of passionate and talented colleagues united by our shared culture and values. Together, we want to use our power, our scale, and our knowledge to push the fashion industry towards a more inclusive and sustainable future.

  

**JOIN US**

Additional information:  

If you feel your experience, skills and ambitions are right for this role, please send your application including CV in English as soon as possible. Interviews will be held continuously. (For internal candidates, please initiate a dialogue with you manager before applying.) If you are currently in a permanent employment with H&M you will keep your permanent employment even if you take on a temporary position for a limited time.


Benefits:


At H&M Group, we are proud to be a vibrant and welcoming company. We offer all our employees at H&M Group attractive benefits with extensive development opportunities around the globe. All our employees receive a staff discount card, usable on all our H&M Group brands in stores and online. Brands covered by the discount are H&M (Beauty and Move included), COS, Weekday, Monki, H&M HOME, & Other Stories, ARKET. In addition to our staff discount, all our employees are included in our H&M Incentive Program – HIP.


Inclusion & Diversity:


H&M is a part of H&M Group. At H&M Group, we’re determined to create and maintain inclusive, diverse and equitable workplaces throughout our organisation. Our teams should consist of a variety of people that share and combine their knowledge, experience and ideas. Having a diverse workforce leads to a positive impact on how we address challenges, on what we perceive possible and on how we choose to relate to our colleagues and customers all over the world. Hence all diversity dimensions are taken into consideration in our recruitment process.


We strive to have a fair and equal process and therefore kindly ask you not to attach a cover letter in your application as they often contain information that easily can trigger unintentional biases.


 Take the next step in your career together with us. The journey starts here.
company_description: At H&M, we welcome you to be yourself and challenge you to grow and make a difference. Help us reimagine the future of an entire industry, making everyone look, feel & do good.

title: Junior Systemutvecklare i Trelleborg
description:
Placeringsort
Trelleborg
Diarienummer
FK 2026/011397  



*Varje år fattar Försäkringskassan 21 miljoner beslut som påverkar människors liv och hela samhället. Vi betalar ut cirka 260 miljarder kronor varje år. Det är allas skattepengar vi har hand om. Det är ett stort ansvar. Därför tänker vi nytt och använder den senaste tekniken för att förenkla och förbättra, utveckla och leverera it-tjänsterna för den svenska socialförsäkringen. Välkommen till en av Sveriges största IT-avdelningar.*Trelleborg är ett nyetablerat it-kontor och vi söker nu förstärkning för att för att utöka verksamheten. Du som medarbetare är vår viktigaste tillgång. Vi uppmuntrar aktivt att alla tar ansvar för och använder tid till sin kompetensutveckling. Vi erbjuder en modern arbetsplats med stora möjligheter att utvecklas på både djup och bredd där vi lägger stort fokus på kompetensutveckling samt fysiskt och psykiskt välmående.


**Systemutveckling, agila team**
--------------------------------



Vi fortsätter att växa och nu söker vi dig som är systemutvecklare med stort intresse för kodutveckling. Det är ett jobb för dig som vill vara med och bidra i arbetet med att bygga samhällsviktiga funktioner och samtidigt jobba med modern teknik på en spännande arbetsplats.



Du kommer jobba i agila team med stort fokus på eget ansvar och vilja att ständigt förbättra vår verksamhet, där ditt engagemang och dina idéer är viktiga. En god användarupplevelse är en viktig del av arbetet. Du förväntas samarbeta väl med andra, värna om kvalitet och ha en vilja att utvecklas tillsammans med oss.



Du ingår i ett utvecklingsteam där du förväntas kunna vara delaktig i teamets teknikval och design och tillsammans med andra systemutvecklare i andra team. Du förväntas kunna röra dig från container och applikationsserver till användargränssnitt och tillsammans med övriga i teamet arbeta med kontinuerlig integration och analys. Exempel på verktyg och tekniker du kommer i kontakt med är Java, JavaScript, Vue.js, Python, Git, OpenShift, SonarQube, NexusIQ, Docker och Kubernetes.



Tjänsten innebär att du hanterar sekretessbelagda uppgifter vilket ställer höga krav på rätt hantering. Därför är det viktigt att du som ska arbeta hos oss har högt säkerhetsmedvetande.



Det är ett jobb för dig som vill vara med och ta ansvar.



Vi söker dig som


* har högskoleexamen inom it-området eller erfarenheter och kvalifikationer som kan prövas likvärdiga
* har praktisk erfarenhet av systemutveckling i Frontend eller Backend
* agerar på eget initiativ och tar ansvar för att nå goda resultat
* samarbetar effektivt med andra för att nå gemensamma mål
* har ett systematiskt och noggrant arbetssätt
* kan förstå och analysera komplexa frågor
* har god kommunikativ förmåga, i tal och skrift
* har goda kunskaper i svenska, i tal och skrift.


Det är meriterande om du har


* erfarenhet om Försäkringskassans it-avdelning och verktyg
* erfarenhet av utvecklingsarbete på Försäkringskassan.


Vi lägger stor vikt vid dina personliga egenskaper.


**Övrigt**
----------



Två tjänster, tillsvidare, heltid, med tillträde enligt överenskommelse. Provanställning kan bli aktuellt. I enlighet med Försäkringskassans riktlinje för säkerhet genomförs bakgrundskontroller i denna rekrytering. Placeringsort: Trelleborg.



Vill du veta mer om Försäkringskassan som arbetsgivare? Besök fk.se/jobbahososs


**Kontaktpersoner**
-------------------



Chef: Petter Norman, 010-113 09 70 eller Svante Fahlström, 010-114 47 96 (för frågor om tjänsten). HR-specialist: Hanna Fransson, hanna.fransson@forsakringskassan.se, 010-113 44 55 (för frågor om rekryteringsprocessen). Fackliga representanter är för ST Ida Kjellman, Saco-S Magnus Eggers, Seko Eliza Grundström. Dessa nås via vår växel 08-786 90 00.


**Ansökan**
-----------



Välkommen med din ansökan senast den 10 maj. Ladda gärna upp dina examensbevis, betyg och intyg i samband med din ansökan.



Har du skyddade personuppgifter eller ingen tillgång till bank-id ringer du den HR-specialist som finns namngiven i annonsen så får du hjälp med att skicka in din ansökan.


Vi ska i allt vi gör, agera med utgångspunkt i principen om alla människors lika värde, rättssäkerhet och med god service.

title: Agentic Automation Developer
description:
* Application Deadline: May 17, 2026
* Kista
* Hybrid
**Job Description**
-------------------

At Tele2, our mission is to enable a society of unlimited possibilities. We are a challenger at heart, constantly seeking smarter ways to work and deliver exceptional value to our customers. Our Intelligent Automation journey is a critical part of this mission, and we are looking for a pioneer to help us drive efficiency, innovation, and digital transformation from within. If you are passionate about building the future of work and thrive in a dynamic, forward-thinking environment, you belong with us.


**The Role: Your opportunity to make an impact**



We are seeking an experienced and visionary Agentic Automation Developer to join our Data & AI Organization. You will be the technical cornerstone of our automation initiatives, with a primary focus on architecting, developing, and governing solutions within the Agentic Suite of products, Microsoft Power Automate and/or UiPath platform suite.



This is not just a developer role; you are technology hands-on leader, and a mentor. You will be instrumental in designing scalable, secure, and robust automation solutions that solve real-world business problems. While your expertise will be rooted in Agentic Automation Products, and/or Power Automate (Cloud, Desktop, and Administration), your versatility and experience with other leading platforms like UiPath, N8N will be key to shaping our multi-platform automation strategy.



At Tele2, our mission is to enable a society of unlimited possibilities. We are a challenger at heart, constantly seeking smarter ways to work. Our automation journey is evolving from process-driven tasks to goal-oriented intelligent agents. We are looking for a pioneer to help us build the next generation of our digital workforce using agentic AI. If you are passionate about creating autonomous systems that can reason, plan, and act to solve complex business challenges, you belong with us.


**The Role: Your opportunity to build the future**



We are seeking a visionary and highly technical Agentic Automation Developer to join our Data & AI Organization. You will be the technical solution developer of our agentic automation initiatives, responsible for designing, building, and governing autonomous AI agents that leverage Large Language Models (LLMs) and a suite of digital tools.



This is more than a development role; you are a pioneer in a rapidly emerging field. You will design and orchestrate multi-tool AI agents capable of handling dynamic, goal-oriented work. While your expertise will be rooted in modern AI development with Python and agentic frameworks, your ability to integrate these agents with our existing enterprise platforms like Power Automate and UiPath will be critical.


**Key Responsibilities:**


* Collaborate with business stakeholders to identify high-value opportunities for agentic automation where autonomous agents can manage complex, goal-driven objectives.
* Translate high-level business goals into agentic workflows, defining agent objectives, toolsets, and success metrics.


*Agent Design & Development:*


* Lead the design and development of sophisticated, autonomous AI agents using agentic frameworks and LLMs.
* Develop end-to-end agentic solutions, equipping agents with tools to interact with enterprise applications via APIs, UI automation, and other integrations using products eg., n8n.
* Develop and maintain a library of reusable agent skills, tools, and prompt templates to accelerate future development and enhance agent capabilities.


*Platform & Tool Governance:*


* Establish governance for the agentic automation ecosystem, including LLM usage, prompt management, vector databases, and ensuring responsible AI principles.
* Contribute to the administration of our existing automation platforms, such as Power Automate and UiPath, ensuring they can be leveraged as tools by AI agents.


*Technical Leadership & Mentorship:*


* Serve as the Subject Matter Expert (SME) for Agentic AI solutions, LLMs, and prompt engineering, providing guidance to the wider organization.
* Champion best practices in agentic design, including robust planning, reasoning, error handling, and security.
* Conduct workshops and code reviews to uplift the technical capabilities of the automation community at Tele2.


**Required Skills & Qualifications (Must-Haves):**


* 3 to 5 years of hands-on experience in software consulting, development and/or automation, with a portfolio in AI/ML or agentic systems.
* Good-level proficiency in Power Automate and/or UiPath with hands-on experience with agentic AI frameworks and Claude Code.
* Good understanding of Large Language Models (LLMs) and experience integrating with them via APIs (e.g., Azure OpenAI).
* Strong knowledge of prompt engineering, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), and vector databases.
* Strong understanding of API-based integration (REST/SOAP) and data formats like JSON.
* Excellent problem-solving skills, with the ability to deconstruct complex business goals into logical, agent-executable plans.
* A bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, AI, or a related field.


**Preferred Skills & Qualifications (Nice-to-Haves):**


* Microsoft Certifications, particularly in Azure AI or Power Platform (e.g., PL-500).
* Familiarity with Azure AI services, including Azure Functions and Azure Logic Apps.
* Experience with MLOps, deploying AI models and systems into production environments.
* Experience working in an Agile/Scrum development environment.
**Great Place to Work**
-----------------------

* Pension and health care
* Hybrid and flexible work life balance
* Career opportunities
* Parental benefit
* Employee benefits and Tele2 discounts
* Inclusive workplace
**Skills & Requirements**
-------------------------

**A few words from the manager**


*Hi, I'm Girish Pai, Head of Intelligent Automation, and I'm genuinely excited to find the next pioneer for our team. You will be joining our dynamic and collaborative group within the Intelligent Automation organization, where we truly embrace a challenger of culture and a passion for continuous learning. We're at an exciting inflection point, combining our strong automation pipeline with the emerging world of process automation and agentic AI. We value openness, experimentation, and learning from each other, whether that's through internal tech talks, or just grabbing a coffee to whiteboarding an idea. This is a unique opportunity to be much more than a developer; you will be our technical cornerstone and a hands-on enabler, shaping Tele2's entire multi-platform automation strategy and making a visible impact on our digital transformation. If you're looking for a place where your technical skills are matched with real business impact and the freedom to explore what's next in AI, I'd love to hear from you.*


**Why Tele2**


* A culture of natural born challengers – At Tele2 we don’t just do things the traditional way. We challenge the status quo and push boundaries to create smarter and more valuable solutions for our customers. You will be part of a culture that values curiosity, initiative and collaboration, where new ideas are welcomed and everyone’s contribution matters.
* Inclusive and supportive environment – We believe in fostering a creative and flexible workplace where people can bring their whole selves to work. Diversity and inclusion are important to us, and we strive to create an environment where people feel welcome, respected and supported in growing both personally and professionally.
* A sustainability challenger – We are proud that Tele2 has been recognized as Europe’s Climate Leader by the Financial Times and named as Sweden’s most sustainable company by Time Magazine and Statista, reflecting our strong commitment to reduce emissions, transparency and long-term climate goals. Our efforts focus on three areas where we can make the biggest difference: advancing a circular economy, combating climate change, and protecting children online. By embedding these focus areas into how we operate and innovate, we aim to create positive impact for people, planet and profit.


**Interest and application**  

Would you like to be a part of the Tele2s value-driven and including culture? Then hit the “apply now” button and let’s find out if we’re a match!



If you have any specific questions regarding the position, please feel free to contact TA specialist: angelica.ek@tele2.com



Please note that in compliance with personal data management regulations (GDPR), we are unable to accept CVs via email.
  

  

Warmly welcome to submit your application! To ensure an inclusive and fair recruitment process, we focus on your experiences and skills. Therefore, Tele2 has chosen not to consider cover letters. Instead, we kindly ask you to answer the screening questions included in the application form.


*As a step in the recruitment process, Tele2 performs a background check on final candidates.*

**Work with great people**
--------------------------

Emma
Digital Capabilities & Technology
*"Everyone at Tele2 always aim for the stars in order to create unlimited possibilities."*
Fanny
Systemspecialist Unified Communications
*"The work environment at Tele2 supports both personal and professional development, and there are significant opportunities for further career advancement"*
**About the company**
---------------------

At Tele2, we challenge the telecom industry to create more valuable solutions for our customers. Guided by our challenger mindset, we deliver high-quality connectivity and digital services, ranging from mobile and fixed networks to TV, streaming and global IoT.


Sustainability is an integral part of how we work. Tele2 has been recognized as a climate leader in Europe by the Financial Times and named Sweden’s most sustainable company, reflecting our long-term commitment to reducing our environmental impact and advancing circular solutions together with our customers.


Our values – Be Brave, Take Action, Make it Simple and Act Cost-efficiently – guide our culture, how we collaborate and how we turn ideas into action.  



  

Enable "functional cookies" to watch the video
company_description: We enable the transformation of businesses and the creation of tomorrow’s infrastructure. Connecting people and technology far and wide, as well as right here around us. Simple. Sustainable. Smart.

title: Software Engineer
description:
*Nordnet redefined the financial world as the first digital bank in Europe. Now we are about to do it again and the aim is to create the next generation of bank, in the cloud. We know that this requires great people, great teams, and great technology. Do you want to join us and build the new Nordnet?*
**In brief**
 At Nordnet we want to democratize savings and investments by giving our customers access to the best tools and information whether you are a professional investor or a small saver. With modern technologies and speed of delivery, we are building the next generation investment platform.
   

  

**This is part of the role**
 Nordnet is a company with tech as the primary focus. In our agile and autonomous teams, you will be working with engaged colleagues that love to share their knowledge. As a developer at Nordnet, you will have the possibility to make an impact and create value for our customers with continuous releases several times a day.
   

  

**This is you**
 To succeed in this role, we believe that you take great pride in your work, are curious and continuously want to learn and grow. Collaboration and discussing ideas and concepts with your colleagues are things you enjoy and believe are important in order to build great products.
   

  

**Who are you?**
 We are looking for both
 **Backend** 
 and
 **Fullstack Software Engineers** 
 . You are a team player who automates everything – especially testing – and thrives in a DevOps-culture.
   

  

**Key Requirements**
* Core Tech: Modern Java (17+), Spring Boot, and Cloud development.
* Fullstack-track: Experience in React, TypeScript, and Node.js.
* DevOps: Interest in Infrastructure as Code and CI/CD.
* Mindset: You enjoy designing, deploying, and running your own services.


*Bonus: Experience with high-performing/low-latency systems or a personal interest in investments.*
**Nordnetters**
* Are proud of the friendly and humble environment
* Believe that the best code is written together and therefore appreciate pair/mob programming
* Continuously improve to ensure quality, making the code better with every release
* Commit to goals as a team, sharing the responsibility, success and failure


**What We Offer**
* Backend agile team which owns and maintains their product
* Your expertise and contribution will be appreciated from day one
* Plenty of opportunities to grow as an engineer
* Competitive salary and compensation


 We offer you the opportunity to work in a Nordic environment with a strong focus on delivery, product development and technology. Our ambitions are high and you will embark on a fast and challenging journey together with a skillful team of sharp and committed colleagues. Our teams are autonomous and embrace the agile way of working.
   

  

 Culture is built and cared for, each day by everyone. We’re proud of ours. Having a flat organization where anyone can talk to anyone creates a warm and friendly atmosphere worth protecting. We believe in a culture where every effort counts and where everyone is being recognized. A culture embracing our core values – passion, simplicity and transparency on all levels, no matter who you are or what you do.
   

  

 We are over 900 employees in Stockholm, Oslo, Helsinki and Copenhagen.
   

  

 Visit us on: www.nordnetab.com and https://career.nordnetab.com/pages/engineering
   

  

**Questions & applications**
 Apply today – Please note that we do only accept applications through our recruitment system, hence no email applications will be considered.
   

  

 We want to inform you that Nordnet conducts mandatory credit and background checks, as well as drug testing as a part of our recruitment process.
   

  

 We look forward to receiving your application!

title: Backend Software Engineer
description:
**The Company**
 PayPal has been revolutionizing commerce globally for more than 25 years. Creating innovative experiences that make moving money, selling, and shopping simple, personalized, and secure, PayPal empowers consumers and businesses in approximately 200 markets to join and thrive in the global economy.
   

  

 We operate a global, two-sided network at scale that connects hundreds of millions of merchants and consumers. We help merchants and consumers connect, transact, and complete payments, whether they are online or in person. PayPal is more than a connection to third-party payment networks. We provide proprietary payment solutions accepted by merchants that enable the completion of payments on our platform on behalf of our customers.
   

  

 We offer our customers the flexibility to use their accounts to purchase and receive payments for goods and services, as well as the ability to transfer and withdraw funds. We enable consumers to exchange funds more safely with merchants using a variety of funding sources, which may include a bank account, a PayPal or Venmo account balance, PayPal and Venmo branded credit products, a credit card, a debit card, certain cryptocurrencies, or other stored value products such as gift cards, and eligible credit card rewards. Our PayPal, Venmo, and Xoom products also make it safer and simpler for friends and family to transfer funds to each other. We offer merchants an end-to-end payments solution that provides authorization and settlement capabilities, as well as instant access to funds and payouts. We also help merchants connect with their customers, process exchanges and returns, and manage risk. We enable consumers to engage in cross-border shopping and merchants to extend their global reach while reducing the complexity and friction involved in enabling cross-border trade.
   

  

 Our beliefs are the foundation for how we conduct business every day. We live each day guided by our core values of Inclusion, Innovation, Collaboration, and Wellness. Together, our values ensure that we work together as one global team with our customers at the center of everything we do – and they push us to ensure we take care of ourselves, each other, and our communities.
   

  

**Job Summary:**
 As PayPal continues its mission to revolutionize payments, we’re looking for a skilled Backend Software Engineer to join our Seller Profile Team in Stockholm. This role is an exciting opportunity to work on interesting challenges together with talented peers in a cross-functional agile team. You will create modern digital products that affect people’s lives for the better within PayPal globally. If this sounds exciting, read on — the best is yet to come!
   

  

**Job Description:**
**Essential Responsibilities:**
* Delivers complete solutions spanning all phases of the Software Development Lifecycle (SDLC) (design, implementation, testing, delivery and operations), based on definitions from more senior roles.
* Advises immediate management on project-level issues
* Guides junior engineers
* Operates with little day-to-day supervision, making technical decisions based on knowledge of internal conventions and industry best practices
* Applies knowledge of technical best practices in making decisions


**Minimum Qualifications:**
* 3+ years relevant experience and a Bachelor’s degree OR Any equivalent combination of education and experience.


**Additional Responsibilities & Preferred Qualifications:**
**Meet our Team:**
 We are the Seller Profile Team on a mission to Help merchants to give reasons to their customers to return, we operate at scale serving millions of customers. We work as an Agile cross functional team and like to deliver small high-quality increments regularly for our customers. We are welcoming to new team members and are here to support your learning journey in ways that suit you.
   

  

**Your way to impact:**
 As a Backend Software Engineer, your responsibilities will notably include:
   

  

* Shape the Foundation: Own and evolve the backend services that power payment experiences for millions of merchants and consumers worldwide.
* Drive Technical Excellence: Influence architectural decisions and champion best practices around reliability, scalability, and security across the platform.
* Collaborate Across Boundaries: Work closely with product managers, frontend engineers, and other stakeholders to translate business needs into robust technical solutions.
* Elevate the Team: Share your expertise through code reviews, design discussions, and knowledge-sharing sessions, helping raise the bar for the entire engineering team.


**You day-to-day:**
* You will focus on your learning while helping to deliver high quality solutions to our users.
* Collaborate with the team to define, design, and ship new features.
* You work closely with product to understand context and vision.
* You will learn and work with your peers in the Backend chapter to make incremental platform improvements and increase learning opportunities for all in a supportive environment.
* You can bring your desire to innovate during and hack weeks and lab days on a bimonthly basis.


**What do you need to succeed:**
* Advanced proficiency in Java, with strong expertise in core concepts, design patterns, and optimization techniques.
* Extensive hands-on experience with Java frameworks like Spring (Spring Boot, Spring MVC) and Hibernate, building scalable and maintainable solutions.
* Proven experience in designing and implementing high-performance API services, focusing on scalability, reliability, and performance in production environments.
* Strong ability to collaborate with cross-functional teams, contributing to technical leadership through code reviews, design discussions, and mentoring less experienced engineers.


**We Believe in You**
 Interested in knowing more? Don't hesitate to apply and/or let's talk – we'd love to get to know you!
   

  

 \_
   

  

**Subsidiary:**
 PayPal
   

  

**Travel Percent:**
 0
   

  

 PayPal does not charge candidates any fees for courses, applications, resume reviews, interviews, background checks, or onboarding. When making an application directly, we will never ask you to share passwords, one-time passcodes (OTP), or verification codes. Any such request is a red flag and likely part of a scam. All communication regarding your application will come from official PayPal email domains. If you suspect fraudulent activity, please report it immediately. To learn more about how to identify and avoid recruitment fraud please visit https://careers.pypl.com/contact-us.
   

  

 For the majority of employees, PayPal's balanced hybrid work model offers 3 days in the office for effective in-person collaboration and 2 days at your choice of either the PayPal office or your home workspace, ensuring that you equally have the benefits and conveniences of both locations.
   

  

**Our Benefits:**
 At PayPal, we’re committed to building an equitable and inclusive global economy. And we can’t do this without our most important asset-you. That’s why we offer comprehensive, choice-based programs, to support all aspects of personal wellbeing—physical, emotional, and financial—delivering meaningful value where it matters most. We strive to create a flexible, balanced work culture with a holistic approach to benefits, including generous paid time off, healthcare coverage for you and your family, and resources to create financial security and support your mental health.
   

  

**Who We Are:**
 Click Here to learn more about our culture and community.
   

  

**Commitment to Diversity and Inclusion**
 PayPal provides equal employment opportunity (EEO) to all persons regardless of age, color, national origin, citizenship status, physical or mental disability, race, religion, creed, gender, sex, pregnancy, sexual orientation, gender identity and/or expression, genetic information, marital status, status with regard to public assistance, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state, or local law. In addition, PayPal will provide reasonable accommodations for qualified individuals with disabilities. If you are unable to submit an application because of incompatible assistive technology or a disability, please contact us at paypalglobaltalentacquisition@paypal.com.
   

  

**Belonging at PayPal:**
 Our employees are central to advancing our mission, and we strive to create an environment where everyone can do their best work with a sense of purpose and belonging. Belonging at PayPal means creating a workplace with a sense of acceptance and security where all employees feel included and valued. We are proud to have a diverse workforce reflective of the merchants, consumers, and communities that we serve, and we continue to take tangible actions to cultivate inclusivity and belonging at PayPal.
   

  

 Any general requests for consideration of your skills, please Join our Talent Community.
   

  

 We know the confidence gap and imposter syndrome can get in the way of meeting spectacular candidates. Please don’t hesitate to apply.

description:

* 8–10+ years of experience.


**Tech environment**
* Backend - Java, Spring Boot, JPA, Kafka, Vert.x, Lucene, Memcache, Caffeine, .NET
* ETL / Batch - Spring Batch, Apache Camel, Stored Procedures
* Database - Microsoft SQL Server (MSSQL)
* Platform / Runtime - ESP, migrating towards TechStack, Kubernetes, Linux
* CI/CD - Bitbucket, Jenkins, Artifactory
* Security - NINAA, JWT, LogI (audit logging)
* Monitoring & Logging - Splunk, AppDynamics, Sysdig, Grafana
* Integrations - Kafka, REST APIs, Mainframe (file-based integrations), Legacy adapters


**Application deadline:** 
 29-04-2026
 **About Us**
 We currently employ experienced consultants in areas such as System Development, AI, Machine Learning, Testing, Cloud, Infra DevOps, and IT Project Management.
   

  

 Working at Deploja is something entirely different from working at an ordinary consulting company—and we are really proud of that. So, what makes us unique?

title: Fullstack Developer to Ahlsell
description:
**About The Role**
 Ahlsell is looking for a
 **Fullstack Developer** 
 to join its e‑commerce team – a key role in the continued modernization of the company’s e‑commerce platform. This is an opportunity to work close to both technology and business in a team with strong ownership, high pace and clear responsibility for the entire platform lifecycle.
   

  

 You will join Ahlsell’s e‑commerce team and work on the platform that powers both websites and mobile applications. In this role, you will help develop, maintain and evolve robust, scalable full‑stack solutions that deliver an excellent user experience for customers and internal users. You will be part of Ahlsell Group’s ongoing journey to modernize the tech stack, building cloud‑ready and future‑proof solutions with a strong focus on quality, reliability and performance.
   

  

* Develop and maintain full‑stack solutions across React, .NET/C# and databases, with responsibility for performance and scalability in distributed systems.
* Contribute to architecture and modernization initiatives, including microservices, event‑driven patterns, modern integrations and cloud‑ready solutions.
* Improve reliability, observability and testability through monitoring with tools such as Grafana and OpenTelemetry, as well as automated testing and CI/CD pipelines.


**Your profile**
 As a person, you are self‑driven and comfortable in change. You take initiative, identify improvement opportunities and are not afraid to take responsibility for both details and the bigger picture. You have an entrepreneurial mindset, collaborate well with others and contribute to an open and constructive team culture. A genuine interest in the business and a desire to contribute to long‑term development are key to succeeding in this role.
   

  

**Required**
* Experience in backend development using C# / .NET
* Experience in frontend development using React
* Used to working in environments with high pace and a high degree of autonomy


**Meriting**
* Experience in e‑commerce
* Experience or interest in architecture and platform‑oriented development
* Experience with cloud and infrastructure solutions, such as Azure, Kubernetes and Terraform
* Knowledge of CI/CD, monitoring and observability
* Experience with CMS and search solutions, e.g. EPI Server and Voyado Elevate
* Experience using AI tools in development, such as GitHub Copilot and Claude Code


**About Ahlsell**
 Ahlsell is the Nordic region's leading distributor of installation products, tools and supplies. The Group has a turnover of approximately SEK 40 billion and around 6000 employees in six countries. To ensure a successful and sustainable organization, we place great focus on our employees to make them grow, feel proud and committed and to ensure that Ahlsell attracts new competent employees. The Ahlsell spirit is based on our strong business acumen and can be described with our values; accountability, openness and simplicity. These values permeate all parts of our business when we strive to be at the forefront when it comes to sustainability, profitability growth, inclusion, diversity and openness to innovation.
   

  

**Application**
 In this recruitment,
 **Ahlsell** 
 collaborates with
 **Wise** 
 .
   

  

 We do not accept applications by email. Instead, apply easily with your CV or LinkedIn profile at
 **wise.se** 
 . We use competency‑based recruitment to enable a more potential‑driven match. We therefore welcome candidates with diverse backgrounds, ages and experiences, as we know diversity makes us stronger and smarter as an organization.
   

  

 If you have questions about the role or the process, please contact recruitment consultant
 **Jacob Elmeljung** 
 @jacob.elmeljung@wise.se

title: Product Developer – Kids Complements
description:
**Job Description**

*Are you an experienced Product Developer with a passion for kidswear and a background in licensed products? We are now looking for a
 **Product Developer** 
 to join our
 **KIDS Complements** 
 team and take part in developing exciting, commercial products with strong brand value.* 
*You have a great eye for upcoming Kids fashion trends and their lifestyle. You are positive and energetic, creative and playful and a great communicator – and you understand the importance of balancing design, quality, and profitability.*




  

  

**WHAT YOU’LL DO** 
  

  





 As a Product Developer within KIDS Complements, you will play a key role in the end‑to‑end product development process — from idea and design handover to final production. You will work closely with internal teams and external suppliers, ensuring product quality, cost efficiency, sustainability, and on‑time delivery. A core part of the role is working with
 **licensed products** 
 , where accuracy, brand guidelines, and approval processes are essential.
   

  





**Key Responsibilities include:**



* Drive the product development process from first sample to finished product, ensuring strong execution and translating the vision into a final product, driving it all the way to completion.
* Work with
 **licensed brands** 
 , ensuring all products follow brand guidelines and approval processes
* Manage samples, fittings, comments, and product revisions
* Secure correct quality, fit, materials, colors, and details
* Collaborate closely with Design, Buying, Garment Technicians, and Sourcing
* Communicate daily with suppliers and follow up on timelines, costs, and deliveries
* Ensure products meet commercial and profitability targets, sustainability requirements, and customer expectations



  

  





**WHO YOU ARE**



* Previous experience as a Product Developer, preferably within kidswear or accessories/complements
* Previous experience working with licensed products (mandatory)
* Solid understanding of the full product development process
* Strong attention to detail and ability to manage multiple styles simultaneously
* Good communication skills and a collaborative mindset
* A structured, solution‑oriented way of working
* Comfortable working in a fast‑paced, dynamic environment



  

  





**WHO WE ARE** 
**​** 





 H&M Group is a global company of strong fashion brands and ventures. Our goal is to prove that there is no compromise between exceptional design, affordable prices, and sustainable solutions. We want to liberate fashion for the many, and our customers are at the heart of every decision we make.​
   

  





 We are made up of thousands of passionate and talented colleagues united by our shared culture and values. Together, we want to use our power, our scale, and our knowledge to push the fashion industry towards a more inclusive and sustainable future. ​
   

  





  

  





**JOIN US** 






 Additional information:
   

  

 This is a full time, 1 year temporary position with placement in Stockholm. If you feel your experience, skills and ambitions are right for this role, please send your application including CV in English as soon as possible. Interviews will be held continuously. (For internal candidates, please initiate a dialogue with you manager before applying.)  If you are currently in a permanent employment with H&M you will keep your permanent employment even if you take on a temporary position for a limited time.
   

  





  

  





**Benefits:** 
  

  

 At H&M Group, we are proud to be a vibrant and welcoming company. We offer all our employees at H&M Group attractive benefits with extensive development opportunities around the globe. All our employees receive a staff discount card, usable on all our H&M Group brands in stores and online. Brands covered by the discount are H&M (Beauty and Move included), COS, Weekday, Monki, H&M HOME, & Other Stories, ARKET. In addition to our staff discount, all our employees are included in our H&M Incentive Program – HIP.
   

  





  

  





**Inclusion & Diversity:**
  

 H&M is a part of H&M Group. At H&M Group, we’re determined to create and maintain inclusive, diverse and equitable workplaces throughout our organisation. Our teams should consist of a variety of people that share and combine their knowledge, experience and ideas. Having a diverse workforce leads to a positive impact on how we address challenges, on what we perceive possible and on how we choose to relate to our colleagues and customers all over the world. Hence all diversity dimensions are taken into consideration in our recruitment process.
   

  





 We strive to have a fair and equal process and therefore kindly ask you not to attach a cover letter in your application as they often contain information that easily can trigger unintentional biases.
   

  





  

  





**Take the next step in your career together with us. The journey starts here.**

title: Software Developer
description:
As a Software Engineer reporting to an Engineering Manager, you'll play a critical role in maintaining and evolving Nasdaq's Clearing technology platform, supporting some of the world's largest clearing houses with mission-critical systems that operate 24/7.
   

  

 You'll thrive in this position if you're driven by innovation, comfortable diving into established production systems and large legacy codebases, and bring a genuine passion for building high-quality technology solutions across a broad technology stack—including Java backend services, front-end interfaces, DevOps tooling, and cloud infrastructure.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Own the analysis, troubleshooting, and enhancement of production systems powering critical clearing and settlement functions, ensuring system stability while making thoughtful improvements to legacy codebases.
* Shape and improve the next-generation Clearing System through full lifecycle participation—from design and implementation to testing and deployment—delivering systems that meet the highest quality standards.
* Collaborate in agile ceremonies and maintain clear, up-to-date technical documentation to support team alignment and knowledge sharing.
* Conduct code and design reviews with the team to continuously improve system quality, architectural decisions, and engineering best practices.
* Participate in 24/7 on-call support rotations to ensure high availability and rapid incident resolution for mission-critical clearing services.


**Required Qualifications**
* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field, or equivalent practical experience.
* 1 - 3 years of experience in Java backend development.
* Genuine interest in learning and working with existing production systems, including large legacy codebases—comfortable understanding existing architectures and making improvements while maintaining stability.
* Self-driven with a sense of structure and creativity, able to balance innovation with operational excellence.
* Experience working effectively in agile teams with strong collaboration and communication skills.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience working with tools or platforms such as Gradle, Git, GitLab, Jenkins, AWS, or Kubernetes.
* Familiarity with capital markets domains such as clearing, settlement, trading, financial instruments, or corporate actions.
* Exposure to global teams and cultural nuances in cross-border collaboration.


 This position will be located in Stockholm and offers the opportunity for a hybrid work environment at least 3 days a week in-office, subject to change, providing flexibility and accessibility for qualified candidates.
   

  

**Come as You Are**
 Nasdaq is an equal opportunity employer. We welcome applications from candidates of all backgrounds and identities.
   

  

 We are committed to fostering an inclusive workplace where diverse perspectives, experiences, and identities are valued and celebrated.
   

  

 We ensure that individuals with disabilities are provided with reasonable accommodation throughout the hiring process.
   

  

**Benefits & Rewards**
 We offer a competitive, holistic total rewards package designed to support the financial, physical, and emotional well-being of our employees and their families.
   

  

 In addition to base salary, Nasdaq provides a generous annual bonus/commission (short-term incentive), equity (long-term incentive), comprehensive benefits, and opportunities for growth.
   

  

 We utilize a structured job architecture and career framework to ensure growth opportunities are transparent, fair, and accessible to all employees. The pay range you see reflects the full salary band for this job level, including room for progression over time. The actual offer will depend on factors like your skills, experience, qualifications, and location, and will fall within a portion of the posted range that's appropriate for this role.
   

  

 For more information, visit Nasdaq Benefits & Rewards Career Page.
   

  

**Come as You Are**
 Nasdaq is an equal opportunity employer. We positively encourage applications from suitably qualified and eligible candidates regardless of age, color, disability, national origin, ancestry, race, religion, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity and/or expression, veteran status, genetic information, or any other status protected by applicable law.
   

  

 We will ensure that individuals with disabilities are provided reasonable accommodation to participate in the job application or interview process, to perform essential job functions, and to receive other benefits and privileges of employment. Please contact us to request an accommodation.

title: Senior Software Engineer
description:
TL;DR
   

  

 We’re looking for a
 **Senior Software Engineer** 
 to help shape the future of hiring. You’ll work across our stack to build products that make hiring fair, predictive, and delightful — for everyone.
   

  

**Why Alva?**
 At
 **Alva Labs** 
 , we’re redefining how companies hire — replacing gut feeling with science. We’re building an
 **AI-first Hiring System** 
 — the only platform companies need to define roles, assess candidates, make confident decisions, and continuously improve their hiring. It replaces fragmented tools with one cohesive system designed to make hiring accurate, fair, and scalable. Leading companies across Europe trust us to make hiring more accurate, inclusive, and scalable.
   

  

 We’re a small, ambitious team building from
 **Stockholm, Sweden** 
 . We value
 **ownership** 
 ,
 **velocity** 
 , and
 **low-ego collaboration** 
 . We care deeply about our craft and each other — and we’re driven to build something that lasts.
   

  

 Joining now means being part of the growth journey as we scale our product, explore new AI-powered capabilities, and bring fair hiring to millions more people.
   

  

**What We’re Looking For**
* Solid experience building and shipping products end-to-end.
* Strong in modern frontend (React/TypeScript) and backend development (Python/Node.js).
* Solid understanding of software design principles and writing scalable, performant code.
* Product mindset — you can balance speed with long-term thinking and make well-reasoned decisions.
* Collaborative spirit — you thrive in cross-functional teams with product, design, data, and ML.


**What You’ll Do**
 In one sentence:
 **Build the core Alva experience and take it to the next level** 
 .
   

  

* Design, build, and maintain features across the stack — frontend, backend, and infrastructure.
* Take ownership of features end-to-end: from technical design to implementation, deployment, and iteration.
* Collaborate closely with data scientists, designers, ML engineers, and product managers to turn ideas into intuitive experiences.
* Drive projects through the full lifecycle: planning, shipping, learning, and improving.


**Our tech stack**
 We use tools that keep us fast, stable, and happy:
   

  

* Frontend: React, TypeScript
* Backend: Python, Node.js
* Infrastructure: Google Cloud Platform, Kubernetes, and many LLM providers
* Data & Analytics: Python, BigQuery, dbt
* DevOps & Tooling: GitHub, Terraform


**How We Hire**
* Fill out a short application.
* Objective screening with Alva’s own tests (your first interaction with the product we're building!).
* Quick intro call with our Talent team.
* Technical Deep Dive: Complete a practical coding exercise at home. Then, join us for a collaborative session to walk through your solution and extend it live.
* Final Loop: Product & Culture: A combined session to wrap up the process. First, you'll dive into product thinking and collaboration. Then, you'll have a close-out chat to discuss Alva’s vision and culture.
* Background & ID check.


**About Your Application**
* Please apply in English — it’s our company language

title: Senior Software Engineer – AI Product Experience
description:
**Why This Role Matters**
 This team is central to how we deliver AI to our customers. From the infrastructure and RAG pipelines that power intelligence behind the scenes to the conversational UI that brings it to life, this team owns the entire experience. As a senior engineer, your impact will be immediate and highly visible you’ll help define how customers interact with Funnel’s AI capabilities and shape the future of AI-driven marketing insights.
   

  

**About The Engineering Team & Your Role**
 Our engineering teams have deep ownership of their product areas, making daily decisions in close collaboration across teams and with stakeholders. We work in small, iterative cycles- experimenting, learning, and deploying to production multiple times a day. We work closely with AI agents to accelerate the full engineering lifecycle, from rapid prototyping to production development and continuous learning.
   

  

 As a senior engineer on this team, you will drive technical direction across the full AI feature stack: infrastructure, RAG pipelines, Amazon Bedrock integrations, and the web UI that delivers the experience. You’ll play a key role in making architectural decisions, improving systems, and ensuring our AI features are robust, scalable, and intuitive.
   

  

 We primarily use
 **Python and TypeScript, and our entire platform runs in AWS** 
 .
   

  

 At Funnel, engineers own the full lifecycle from architecture and design to implementation, deployment, and monitoring. Senior engineers also mentor others, elevate engineering quality, and help shape product strategy through technical insight.
   

  

**Skills & Experience We’re Looking For**
* Experience building applications with LLMs, including techniques such as RAG, embeddings, vector search, and prompt engineering
* Hands-on experience setting up and maintaining cloud-based AI workloads
* Strong backend engineering skills in TypeScript, Python, or similar languages
* AI mindset: leveraging AI agents to to accelerate the full engineering lifecycle, from rapid prototyping to production development and continuous learning
* Experience designing and operating scalable infrastructure, including APIs, data pipelines, and observability
* Comfortable working with web technologies and building user-facing features (e.g., React, Next.js, or similar frameworks)
* Comfortable working in agile, collaborative teams, partnering closely with fellow engineers and keeping initiatives moving smoothly
* Experience leading or steering projects involving multiple stakeholders
* Strong communication skills and fluency in English


**Why You Should Join Us**
* Build meaningful tech that powers millions of daily jobs for customers around the world.
* Help shape our next-gen platform as we grow and move toward an AI-first future.
* Enjoy real ownership with the freedom to design, build, and ship every day.
* Work with friendly, collaborative teams who care about quality and each other.
* Grow with us in a company that invests in learning, innovation, and people.


**Location & Eligibility**
 At This Time, We Can Only Consider Applicants Who Are Already Based In Stockholm And Meet One Of The Following Criteria
   

  

* Hold Swedish citizenship
* Hold EU/EEA citizenship and are currently living in Stockholm
* Have a valid Swedish work permit


**Office-first**
 At Funnel, we have an office-first approach, and we work from the office a minimum of four days a week. We have lots of flexibility for when life happens, during the summer, through the holidays. We just like to avoid having standing remote days.
   

  

**About Funnel**
 Funnel is the leading Marketing Intelligence platform that empowers marketers to automatically integrate, attribute, measure, and report on data from over 500 marketing platforms.
   

  

 Trusted by almost 3,000 businesses worldwide, including globally recognized brands such as Adidas and Sony, Funnel generated over $57M in ARR in 2025 and continues to feature in the FT 1000 list of Europe’s fastest-growing companies.
   

  

 Since its founding in 2014, Funnel has grown into a global team of over 300 employees, with offices in Stockholm, Boston, Hamburg, and Sydney.
   

  

 Funnel is the leading Marketing Intelligence platform that empowers marketers to automatically integrate, attribute, measure, and report on data from over 500 marketing platforms.
   

  

 Trusted by almost 3,000 businesses worldwide, including globally recognized brands such as Adidas and Sony, Funnel generated over $70M in ARR in 2025 and continues to feature in the FT 1000 list of Europe’s fastest-growing companies.
   

  

 Since its founding in 2014, Funnel has grown into a global team of over 300 employees, with offices in Stockholm, Boston, Hamburg, and Sydney.

title: Kotlin utvecklare
description:
Vi har nu ett nytt behov och söker därför en konsult och kollega med nedan kvalifikationer. Tjänsten är en del av vår konsultverksamhet vilket innebär att du blir anställd av oss och arbetar hos kund alt. interna projekt och åtaganden.

* Minst 5 års erfarenhet av Kotlin och Androidutveckling.
* Minst 3 års erfarenhet av Jetpack Compose och Dagger, Hilt.
* Övriga tekniker JSON, JNI, Gitlab CI, Docker


**Sista ansökningdatum:** 
 04-05-2026
   

  

**Vi erbjuder dig följande, Valet är ditt!**
 🚀 Spännande uppdrag hos våra många kunder. Vi fokuserar på långsiktiga uppdrag, vilket ger dig möjlighet att skapa värde för kunden samtidigt som du utvecklas själv.
   

  

 🌟 En trygg månadslön – tillsammans bestämmer vi en grundlön baserad på dina uppdrag.

* Vi hanterar ansökningar löpande, med hänsyn till höga arbetstrycket är det extra viktigt med en kort motivering för tjänsten som förklarar hur man möter kraven.

title: Senior AWS & Python Backend Developer
description:
At Capgemini Engineering, the world leader in engineering services, we bring together a global team of engineers, scientists, and architects to help the world’s most innovative companies unleash their potential. From autonomous cars to life-saving robots, our digital and software technology experts think outside the box as they provide unique R&D and engineering services across all industries. Join us for a career full of opportunities. Where you can make a difference. Where no two days are the same.
   

  

**Your Role**
 We are looking for a highly skilled and motivated 5+ yrs experienced Senior Developer with strong experience in Python and cloud-native development to join our Stockholm team.
   

  

 In this role, you will work extensively with AWS Serverless technologies, building scalable, reliable and high-performing backend systems that support business-critical applications.
   

  

 The assignment involves designing, developing and maintaining modern cloud-based backend services, with a strong focus on performance, reliability and scalability. The systems are built using serverless architectures and event-driven patterns, enabling efficient and flexible solutions in a cloud-native environment.
   

  

*In this role you will play a key role in:*
* Developing and maintaining backend services using AWS Serverless architecture
* Implementing scalable and reliable solutions using Python
* Designing and building services that support data-driven and event-based architectures. Good to have Experience in building microservices in cloud environments
* Working with AWS storage and database services to support application functionality
* Troubleshooting, optimizing and enhancing backend systems to ensure high availability and performance
* Contributing to CI/CD automation and improving deployment workflows


**Your Profile**
* Strong experience in Python backend development
* Experience building scalable backend systems in cloud environments
* Hands-on experience working with AWS databases and storage solutions and relational databases (PostgreSQL or SQL)
* Experience using Git for version control. Experience with CI/CD pipelines, preferably GitLab CI/CD
* Experience with Infrastructure-as-Code tools such as Terraform or AWS CDK
* Solid experience with AWS Serverless technologies, including:


 AWS Lambda, AWS Step Functions, CloudWatch, API Gateway, S3, DynamoDB, Event Bridge, SNS / SQS
   

  

**What We Believe You Will Enjoy About Working Here**
* We recognize the significance of flexible work arrangements to provide support. Be it remote work, or flexible work hours, you will get an environment to maintain healthy work life balance.
* At the heart of our mission is your career growth. Our array of career growth programs and diverse professions are crafted to support you in exploring a world of opportunities.
* We support your personal development and offer an education library with more than 250 000 (!) courses and educations and certifications.


**Application**
 As part of our recruitment process, identity verification or background checks may occasionally be conducted.
   

  

 Valid work permit for Sweden is required.
   

  

 Capgemini is a global business and technology transformation partner, helping organizations to accelerate their dual transition to a digital and sustainable world, while creating tangible impact for enterprises and society. It is a responsible and diverse group of 340,000 team members in more than 50 countries. With its strong over 55-year heritage, Capgemini is trusted by its clients to unlock the value of technology to address the entire breadth of their business needs. It delivers end-to-end services and solutions leveraging strengths from strategy and design to engineering, all fueled by its market leading capabilities in AI, generative AI, cloud and data, combined with its deep industry expertise and partner ecosystem.

title: Mobile Developer to Ahlsell
description:
**About The Role**
 Ahlsell is now looking for a
 **Senior Mobile Developer** 
 to join its e‑commerce team. This is a dedicated mobile role with clear ownership of Ahlsell’s iOS and Android applications, which are a key part of the company’s digital customer experience.
   

  

 You will work hands‑on with the development, maintenance and evolution of Ahlsell’s mobile apps, used by our customers as well as supporting colleagues with backend development. The role is part of Ahlsell Group’s broader e‑commerce journey, where scalable, stable and future‑proof solutions are critical—primarily within B2B.
   

  

 The team is small and still evolving, which means you will have significant influence over technical decisions, tooling and ways of working. This role suits someone who enjoys responsibility, autonomy and the opportunity to help shape how mobile development is done within the organization.
   

  

**Your profile**
 We are looking for a
 **senior Mobile Developer** 
 who is comfortable taking ownership and making technical decisions in a changing environment. As a person, you are self‑driven, adaptable and comfortable with change. You take initiative, identify what needs to be done and move things forward without waiting for detailed instructions. You have an entrepreneurial mindset, strong communication skills and enjoy working in an environment where not everything is predefined. A genuine interest in the business and a willingness to contribute to the bigger picture are essential for succeeding in this role.
   

  

**Required**
* Strong experience in mobile development for iOS and Android
* Proven experience building native apps and/or React Native applications
* Experience publishing and managing apps in the App Store and Google Play Store
* Strong knowledge of TypeScript (5.9, strict mode)


**Meriting**
* Experience within e‑commerce
* Experience working in small, fast‑moving teams where processes are still being shaped
* Experience collaborating closely with UX/UI and analytics teams
* “Experience using AI tools in development, such as GitHub Copilot and Claude Code.


**About Ahlsell**
 Ahlsell is the Nordic region's leading distributor of installation products, tools and supplies. The Group has a turnover of approximately SEK 40 billion and around 6000 employees in six countries. To ensure a successful and sustainable organization, we place great focus on our employees to make them grow, feel proud and committed and to ensure that Ahlsell attracts new competent employees. The Ahlsell spirit is based on our strong business acumen and can be described with our values; accountability, openness and simplicity. These values permeate all parts of our business when we strive to be at the forefront when it comes to sustainability, profitability growth, inclusion, diversity and openness to innovation.
   

  

**Application**
 In this recruitment,
 **Ahlsell** 
 collaborates with
 **Wise** 
 .
   

  

 We do not accept applications by email. Instead, apply easily with your CV or LinkedIn profile at
 **wise.se** 
 . We use competency‑based recruitment to enable a more potential‑driven match. We therefore welcome candidates with diverse backgrounds, ages and experiences, as we know diversity makes us stronger and smarter as an organization.
   

  

 If you have questions about the role or the recruitment process, please contact the responsible recruitment consultant
 **Jacob Elmeljung** 
 @jacob.elmlejung@wise.se.
   

  

* Work Authorization: Sweden work authorization is a precondition of employment. Mentice will not consider candidates who require sponsorship for a work-authorized visa
* Relocation: No relocation assistance is provided for this role. Candidates must reside within Sweden


 Interviews are conducted on an ongoing basis, and the role may be filled before the final application date.We look forward to your application!
