title: Engineering Manager
description:
**WHO WE ARE** 





 At Trustly, we're building a smarter, faster, and more secure financial future by revolutionizing the world of payments. As a global leader in Open Banking Payments, we are establishing Pay by Bank as the new standard at checkout, providing unparalleled freedom, speed, and ease to millions of consumers and merchants worldwide.
 




  






 Our Ambition: To build the world’s most disruptive payment network and redefine what the payment experience should feel like.
 




  






 Trustly is a global team of innovators, collaborators, and doers.  If you are driven by a strong sense of purpose and thrive in a dynamic, entrepreneurial, and high-growth environment, join us and be part of a team that’s transforming the way the world pays.
 




  





**About the Product & Tech Organisation** 



  


  
 


  



 Our Product & Technology organisation drives the development of Trustly’s products. The cross functional teams collectively work with innovative ideas, development of products and platform and set the vision and strategy for the problem spaces they own. The Product & Tech organisation consists of a bit more than 200 people spread across Stockholm, Lisbon, Örebro, Paris, London and Izmir. 
 



  


  
 


  



 All teams consist of a product manager, an engineering manager, a lead developer and engineers. Some teams also have designers and analytics competence in the team. They all work closely together to enable new products and features within existing products within Europe and to make sure the payment platform runs without interruptions and with high performance.
 



  


  
 


  



 We are now looking to strengthen our engineering capacity within Product & Technology with one more senior position. We operate in an agile culture combined with DevOps, allowing our teams to take on full responsibility from code to on-call.
 



  


  
 


  


**About the Role** 



  


  
 


  



 As an
 
**Engineering Manager** 

 at Trustly, you will play a crucial role in leading and supporting an agile team of talented engineers. Working closely with product managers, lead developers, and other stakeholders, you’ll ensure delivery of high-quality, scalable, and reliable systems while fostering a positive and empowering team culture. This is an excellent opportunity to bridge technical excellence and people management, delivering real impact in the payments industry.
 





  




**What you'll do** 
  
* **Team Leadership** 
 : Lead, coach, and support a team of engineers, enabling them to perform at their best while fostering a culture of collaboration, ownership, and continuous learning
  
* **Delivery Excellence** 
 : Drive successful delivery of the team’s commitments, ensuring alignment with domain objectives and product goals
  
* **Technical Collaboration** 
 : Work hands-on with lead developers and engineers to design, implement, and maintain scalable systems and solutions aligned with Trustly’s technical standards
  
* **Product Partnership** 
 : Work closely with the product manager to define and prioritise the team’s roadmap, balancing short-term goals with long-term vision
  
* **Operational Ownership** 
 : Ensure your team’s systems operate reliably in production, with high performance, availability, and maintainability
  
* **Talent Development** 
 : Recruit, onboard, and mentor engineers, creating an environment where they can grow and thrive
  
* **Process Improvement** 
 : Advocate for and implement best practices in agile methodologies, DevOps, and engineering processes to continuously improve team effectiveness
  

  



  




**Who you are** 
  
* Proven experience managing engineering teams in agile environments, with a strong focus on team empowerment and delivery
  
* Hands-on engineering background with expertise in Java and experience in building scalable, robust systems
  
* Familiarity with modern tech stacks including Kubernetes, Docker, Kafka, and Spring Boot
  
* Experience working with cloud solutions (preferably AWS), monitoring, and analytics
  
* Knowledge of service-based architecture and microservices
  
* Strong ability to balance technical decisions with business needs, ensuring delivery without sacrificing scalability, performance, or reliability
  
* Committed to fostering a culture of collaboration, innovation, and excellence
  
* Passion for DevOps practices and ownership, with a track record of driving improvements in automation and monitoring
  
* Exceptional communication, problem-solving, and leadership skills
  
* Fluent in English
  

  



  




**At Trustly, you’ll have the opportunity to:** 
  
* Shape the future of payments as part of a global leader in the industry
  
* Work with cutting-edge technology and highly skilled colleagues in an agile and collaborative environment
  
* Take on a role with real impact, where your contributions directly drive the success of your team and Trustly’s mission
  
* Enjoy a supportive and dynamic culture that encourages growth, innovation, and ownership
  

  






  




  


**Our Fantastic Benefits**

 (varies by location)
 




 🌴
 **20 to 30 days of holiday** 
 to support a healthy work-life balance
 



 🥳
 **Monthly team outing allowance** 
 to enjoy social events with your colleagues
 



 👶
 **Parental leave top-up** 
 additional support for new parents
 



 🥐
 **Daily breakfast and on-site perks** 
 to make your workday smoother
 



 💚
 **Well being support** 
 our health allowance covers gym memberships, massages, and much more to help you feel your best
 



**PLUS** 
 additional benefits designed to enhance your work-life experience!
 



  





**Shape Your Role and Make an Impact**




 Join a dynamic environment where you can take ownership, drive change, and continuously embrace new challenges. We’re looking for dedicated and highly motivated individuals who thrive in a fast-paced environment and enjoy collaborating across different areas of the organisation.
 



 If your skills and experience align with this role, we’d love to hear from you!
 **Apply now and submit your CV in English.** 



  


 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: Senior Python Engineer- GenAI
description:
**Who You Are**
* A solid engineer with hands-on experience in Python and FastAPI, ideally in platform or infrastructure contexts.
* Experienced with AI/LLM systems — including evaluation frameworks and observability tooling.
* Familiar with Kubernetes and passionate about building reliable, scalable AI infrastructure.
* Eager to contribute to engineering culture and help move Klarna forward on the GenAI frontier.


**What You Will Do**
* Manage and operate Klarna's AI Gateway, ensuring reliable, low-latency access to AI models at scale.
* Onboard teams to the AI Gateway, configure model access, and support diverse use cases across technical levels.
* Adapt and improve evaluation tooling for LLM applications using LangSmith.
* Own tooling and processes that enable safe, compliant, and efficient GenAI use across the organisation.
* Document operational procedures, respond to incidents, and ensure platform stability.
* Drive knowledge sharing through structured learning programmes and help standardise AI content across the org.


**Awesome to have**
* Experience building or operating AI Gateways or similar ML infrastructure at scale.
* Familiarity with LangSmith or other LLM observability and evaluation platforms.
* Background in enablement, developer education, or internal platform evangelism.
* Prior experience shaping team practices or contributing to engineering culture at a fast-moving company.

title: Agentic Automation Developer
description:
At Tele2, we challenge the telecom industry to create more valuable solutions for our customers. Guided by our challenger mindset, we deliver high-quality connectivity and digital services, ranging from mobile and fixed networks to TV, streaming and global IoT.
   

  

 Sustainability is an integral part of how we work. Tele2 has been recognized as a climate leader in Europe by the Financial Times and named Sweden’s most sustainable company, reflecting our long-term commitment to reducing our environmental impact and advancing circular solutions together with our customers.
   

  

 Our values – Be Brave, Take Action, Make it Simple and Act Cost-efficiently – guide our culture, how we collaborate and how we turn ideas into action.
   

  

 At Tele2, our mission is to enable a society of unlimited possibilities. We are a challenger at heart, constantly seeking smarter ways to work and deliver exceptional value to our customers. Our Intelligent Automation journey is a critical part of this mission, and we are looking for a pioneer to help us drive efficiency, innovation, and digital transformation from within. If you are passionate about building the future of work and thrive in a dynamic, forward-thinking environment, you belong with us.
   

  

**The Role: Your opportunity to make an impact**
 We are seeking an experienced and visionary Agentic Automation Developer to join our Data & AI Organization. You will be the technical cornerstone of our automation initiatives, with a primary focus on architecting, developing, and governing solutions within the Agentic Suite of products, Microsoft Power Automate and/or UiPath platform suite.
   

  

 This is not just a developer role; you are technology hands-on leader, and a mentor. You will be instrumental in designing scalable, secure, and robust automation solutions that solve real-world business problems. While your expertise will be rooted in Agentic Automation Products, and/or Power Automate (Cloud, Desktop, and Administration), your versatility and experience with other leading platforms like UiPath, N8N will be key to shaping our multi-platform automation strategy.
   

  

 At Tele2, our mission is to enable a society of unlimited possibilities. We are a challenger at heart, constantly seeking smarter ways to work. Our automation journey is evolving from process-driven tasks to goal-oriented intelligent agents. We are looking for a pioneer to help us build the next generation of our digital workforce using agentic AI. If you are passionate about creating autonomous systems that can reason, plan, and act to solve complex business challenges, you belong with us.
   

  

**The Role: Your opportunity to build the future**
 We are seeking a visionary and highly technical Agentic Automation Developer to join our Data & AI Organization. You will be the technical solution developer of our agentic automation initiatives, responsible for designing, building, and governing autonomous AI agents that leverage Large Language Models (LLMs) and a suite of digital tools.
   

  

 This is more than a development role; you are a pioneer in a rapidly emerging field. You will design and orchestrate multi-tool AI agents capable of handling dynamic, goal-oriented work. While your expertise will be rooted in modern AI development with Python and agentic frameworks, your ability to integrate these agents with our existing enterprise platforms like Power Automate and UiPath will be critical.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities:**
* Collaborate with business stakeholders to identify high-value opportunities for agentic automation where autonomous agents can manage complex, goal-driven objectives.
* Translate high-level business goals into agentic workflows, defining agent objectives, toolsets, and success metrics.


*Agent Design & Development:*
* Lead the design and development of sophisticated, autonomous AI agents using agentic frameworks and LLMs.
* Develop end-to-end agentic solutions, equipping agents with tools to interact with enterprise applications via APIs, UI automation, and other integrations using products eg., n8n.
* Develop and maintain a library of reusable agent skills, tools, and prompt templates to accelerate future development and enhance agent capabilities.


*Platform & Tool Governance:*
* Establish governance for the agentic automation ecosystem, including LLM usage, prompt management, vector databases, and ensuring responsible AI principles.
* Contribute to the administration of our existing automation platforms, such as Power Automate and UiPath, ensuring they can be leveraged as tools by AI agents.


*Technical Leadership & Mentorship:*
* Serve as the Subject Matter Expert (SME) for Agentic AI solutions, LLMs, and prompt engineering, providing guidance to the wider organization.
* Champion best practices in agentic design, including robust planning, reasoning, error handling, and security.
* Conduct workshops and code reviews to uplift the technical capabilities of the automation community at Tele2.


**Required Skills & Qualifications (Must-Haves):**
* 3 to 5 years of hands-on experience in software consulting, development and/or automation, with a portfolio in AI/ML or agentic systems.
* Good-level proficiency in Power Automate and/or UiPath with hands-on experience with agentic AI frameworks and Claude Code.
* Good understanding of Large Language Models (LLMs) and experience integrating with them via APIs (e.g., Azure OpenAI).
* Strong knowledge of prompt engineering, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), and vector databases.
* Strong understanding of API-based integration (REST/SOAP) and data formats like JSON.
* Excellent problem-solving skills, with the ability to deconstruct complex business goals into logical, agent-executable plans.
* A bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, AI, or a related field.


**Preferred Skills & Qualifications (Nice-to-Haves):**
* Microsoft Certifications, particularly in Azure AI or Power Platform (e.g., PL-500).
* Familiarity with Azure AI services, including Azure Functions and Azure Logic Apps.
* Experience with MLOps, deploying AI models and systems into production environments.
* Experience working in an Agile/Scrum development environment.


**Benefits**
 Pension and health care
   

  

 Hybrid and flexible work life balance
   

  

 Career opportunities
   

  

 Parental benefit

title: Senior iOS Mobile Application Developer
description:
**Job Title: Senior iOS Mobile Application Developer / Lead** 




**Location: Stockholm, Sweden** 




  





**Role Summary** 




 We are looking for an experienced
 **Senior iOS Developer / Lead** 
 with strong hands-on expertise in building native iOS mobile applications using
 **Swift, SwiftUI, and Objective-C** 
 . The candidate should have solid experience in mobile architecture, REST API integration, analytics, CI/CD processes, and Agile delivery. The role also requires leading the team, working independently, and coordinating with stakeholders.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Develop and maintain native iOS applications using Swift, SwiftUI, and Objective-C.
* Implement application architecture using MVVM and MVC patterns.
* Integrate REST APIs and handle JSON data consumption.
* Work on application logging, crash analysis (Crashlytics), and Adobe Analytics integration.
* Support CI/CD activities and automated deployments using Jenkins.
* Troubleshoot performance issues, bugs, and production incidents.
* Lead technical discussions, perform code reviews, and mentor team members.
* Work independently with business/technical teams to understand and deliver requirements.
* Participate in Agile/Scrum ceremonies and ensure timely sprint delivery.



  





**Mandatory Skills** 



* 6–8 years of software development experience with 7+ years in iOS native app development
* Strong expertise in:
* Swift
* SwiftUI
* Objective-C
* Experience in MVVM / MVC architecture
* Hands-on REST API integration and JSON parsing
* Experience with Logs, Crashlytics, Adobe Analytics
* Exposure to CI/CD and Jenkins
* Agile/Scrum project experience
* Strong communication and leadership skills



  





**Preferred Skills** 



* Git/version control knowledge
* App performance optimization
* App Store release exposure
* Mobile security best practices

title: Business Developer
description:
**About us** 




 Univrses is a Stockholm-based 3D Computer Vision and AI company. We provide the perception and spatial awareness necessary for an increasingly autonomous world. While our roots are in the automotive sector, we have pioneered a new category: Infrastructure Intelligence. Our 3DAI™ system transforms ordinary vehicles into sophisticated mobile sensors, providing road authorities across Europe (Sweden, UK, Italy, and beyond) with real-time, actionable insights. We are shifting city management from reactive repairs to proactive, data-driven maintenance—saving costs, reducing CO2 emissions, and improving public safety.
 



  





**The Mission** 



* Category Creation: You aren't just selling a product; you are part of changing how cities of the future function.
* International Footprint: With active deployments all over Europe and you will be the engine that expands our reach into existing and new territories.
* Technical Excellence: Work alongside a team of 40 world-class scientists, engineers and business builders in our bright headquarters in Stockholm.
* Established yet Agile: Founded in 2015, we have the stability of an established firm with the soul and speed of a startup.



  





**The Role: Build the Growth Engine** 




 As a Business Developer, you sit at the intersection of deep tech and commercial strategy. Your goal is to turn technical capability into market dominance.
 



  





 Your role:
 


* Own the full-cycle business development process. You will leverage a modern stack (Clay, HubSpot, AI tools) to refine and operate a scalable, data-driven "outbound machine."
* Identify and move leads through the entire pipeline—from initial prospecting and "recruiting champions" within complex organizations to final contractual negotiations.
* Act as a "Technical Translator," converting 3DAI™ data into high-value ROI narratives for government and corporate stakeholders.
* Represent Univrses on stage at industry events and through thought leadership, building a global network of partners and customers.



  





**Who You Are** 



* The "Pioneer" Mindset: You thrive in the scale-up phase. You enjoy building workflows, testing outreach strategies, and figuring out how to crack new markets.
* Strategic & Structured: You are highly organized, using tools like Hubspot, Clay, Jira, and Confluence to ensure no opportunity falls through the cracks.
* Goal-Oriented Hunter: You are motivated by exceeding targets and take personal ownership of the sales pipeline.
* Bilingual Communicator: Professional fluency in English required; fluency in at least one other language highly desirable.



  





**What You Bring** 




 Required:
 


* Experience: Proven track record in Sales or Business Development, ideally within SaaS, Deep Tech, or a high-growth startup.
* Consultative Skills: Ability to navigate complex, multi-stakeholder deals and handle sophisticated negotiations.
* Tech-Savvy: Comfort with modern sales automation and a strong desire to master the latest AI-driven prospecting tools.
* Willingness to Travel: You are excited to be 
 *in the field* 
 , attending international conferences, visiting new markets, and meeting stakeholders across Europe and beyond.



 Preferred:
 


* Background in road management, urban planning, or technical contractor services.
* Experience scaling business operations in a scale-up environment.

title: Integration Architect i Örebro
description:
Beskrivning av tjänsten
   

  

 Vill du vara med i Sveriges vassaste integrations-team? Då är du rätt person för oss!
   

  

 Nu söker vi Dig som vill jobba som Integrationsarkitekt på CGI. Vi erbjuder dig som har ett brinnande intresse för integrationsarkitektur att börja i ett team som arbetar tätt tillsammans.
   

  

 Vi arbetar med spännande kunder i alla branscher vilket gör att du ständigt får nya utmaningar och möjlighet att vidareutvecklas. På CGI strävar vi efter att skapa framgångsrika team som har roligt på jobbet och hjälper varandra att utvecklas. CGI är Sveriges ledande IT-företag och ett av världens största. Detta ger fantastiska karriärmöjligheter och möjlighet till spännande uppdrag.
   

  

 Vårt framgångsrika integrationsteam är som ett eget litet företag inom ramarna för stora CGI vilket ger en stark teamkänsla och samhörighet. Vårt integrationsteam i Örebro går för högvarv och behöver förstärkning. Här får Du möjlighet att jobba med några av de främsta integrationsspecialisterna i branschen!
   

  

 Dina framtida arbetsuppgifter
   

  

* Utveckla och vidareutveckla referens- och målarkitekturer inom integration, data, och infrastruktur, samt ta fram kvalificerade beslutsunderlag för strategiska teknikval.
* Ansvara för och driva moderniseringsinitiativ av integrationsplattformar i hybridmiljöer.
* Driva övergången från monolitiska system till en skalbar och modulär arkitektur byggd på mikrotjänster och API-first.
* Omvärldsbevakning: Analysera, utvärdera och rekommendera teknologier med fokus på långsiktig hållbarhet och kostnadseffektivitet.
* Arbeta nära kunder, utvecklingsteam och leverantörer för att skapa robusta lösningar.
* Synliggöra CGIs integrationskompetens för att bygga förtroende och skapa engagemang hos potentiella kunder.


 Kvalifikationer för att bli framgångsrik denna roll
   

  

**Vi söker dig som har:**
* 5 till 10+ års erfarenhet i rollen som integrationsarkitekt
* Kunskap om Azure PaaS, API Management, Kubernetes, Hybrid Integrations
* Erfarenhet av större moderniseringsprojekt i komplexa IT-miljöer med molnlösningar.
* Förståelse för informations- och dataarkitektur.
* Förmåga att ta fram målarkitekturer och IT-roadmaps.
* Mycket god svenska och engelska i tal och skrift
* Vana av agilt arbete med iterativa leveranser


**Meriterande om du också har:**
* Relevanta certifieringar, till exempel: IT-Arkitekt Master via Dataföreningen, Certified Software Architect Microsoft Platform, Azure Solutions Architect Expert
* Erfarenhet av olika middleware (t.ex. MuleSoft, BizTalk, Boomi)
* Erfarenhet av andra molnlösningar t.ex. AWS och GCP
* Erfarenhet av Generativ AI


**Vad du kan förvänta dig av oss:**
 Vi är en del av CGI:s Developer Center of Excellence (CoE), vilket innebär:
   

  

* Tillgång till ett starkt tekniskt nätverk med några av CGI:s främsta utvecklare
* Kunskapsutbyte, best practices och gemensam teknisk utveckling
* Små team med stort inflytande i det dagliga arbetet
* Styrkan, stabiliteten och möjligheterna i ett globalt bolag
* Tekniskt avancerade projekt med fokus på Microsoft och Azure
* Hög kvalitet i allt vi gör


 Vi kombinerar teknisk spets med en social och inkluderande kultur där vi gör mycket tillsammans:
   

  

* Teamaktiviteter
* After works
* Gemensam fika
* Tekniska workshops etc


 Här är det högt i tak, nära till skratt och stort tekniskt engagemang.
   

  

**Placeringsort:** 
 Örebro
   

  

**Låter det intressant?**
 Vi ser fram emot att höra ifrån dig! Skicka in din ansökan redan i dag då urvalet sker löpande. Har du frågor om rollen, kontakta gärna rekryterande konsultchef Giliam Oostema, giliam.oostema@cgi.com.
   

  

**Vad CGI erbjuder dig**
 CGIs kombination av global och lokal närvaro, med kontor på 30 orter i Sverige, ger nöjda kunder men innebär även att du som anställd alltid har ett kontor nära dig. Detta i kombination med flexibla arbetstider ger dig möjlighet till balans mellan privatliv och arbete, oavsett var i livet just du befinner dig.
   

  

 På CGI finns även stora möjligheter till interna karriärvägar där du kan välja att bli specialist inom ditt område, bredda dig inom nya områden eller ta en ledande befattning. Via våra interna nätverk, projekt och åtaganden i globala och nationella industrier, erbjuder vi dig kompetensutveckling och engagerade ledare som stöttar just dig i din utveckling.
   

  

**Mer information om våra förmåner:**
* Aktieprogram och delägarskap: Som delägare har du möjlighet att påverka och i vårt aktieprogram matchar CGI ditt bidrag, krona för krona upp till 3% av din månadslön.
* Friskvårdsbidrag: Vi erbjuder ett årligt friskvårdsbidrag på 4000 kr.
* Föräldralön: Vi betalar upp till cirka 90% av din lön under den första tiden hemma.
* Trygg anställning: Våra konsulter anställs med kollektivavtal och försäkringar.
* Pensionslösningar: Vi erbjuder attraktiva och förmånliga pensionslösningar.
* Personalbil: Personalbilen används som en privatbil men leasas av CGI.


 #ARCSWE
   

  

**Låt oss som ägare omvandla verklig insikt till handling – tillsammans.**
 Livet på CGI bygger på ägande, lagarbete, respekt och tillhörighet. Tillsammans med oss kommer du att kunna nå din fulla potential.
   

  

 Du är inbjuden att ta ägandeskap redan från första dagen i vårt arbete med att förverkliga vår dröm om att skapa en arbetsmiljö där vi trivs med att arbeta tillsammans och bidrar till framgången för vårt företag. Det är därför vi kallar oss CGI Partners snarare än anställda. Vi drar nytta av vår kollektiva framgång och tillsammans får vi möjlighet att aktivt forma vår företagsstrategi och inriktning.
   

  

 Ditt arbete skapar värde. Du kommer att vara med att utveckla innovativa lösningar och bygga relationer med medarbetare och kunder samtidigt som du får tillgång till globala möjligheter att skala upp dina idéer, omfamna nya möjligheter och dra nytta av gedigen bransch- och teknikexpertis.
   

  

 Du kommer att forma din karriär tillsammans med ett företag som är byggt för att växa och bestå. Du får stöd av ledare som bryr sig om din hälsa och ditt välbefinnande och ger dig möjligheter att fördjupa dina kunskaper och vidga dina vyer.
   

  

 Bli en del en av världens största leverantörer av IT- och affärskonsulttjänster.

title: Product Manager & Medical Content Manager
description:
At Platform24, physicians, engineers, and designers work side by side to build software that makes healthcare safer, more accessible, and more efficient, for both clinicians and patients.
 



 We're the Nordic market leader in automated medical triage and are actively expanding internationally, with customers ranging from large regional health authorities to specialist clinics and insurance companies.
 



  





 A central part of what we offer is our medical content — triage flows that guide patients to the right level of care, structured care plans, and remote patient monitoring pathways that collect clinical history and support continuity of care. As our Product Manager and Medical Content Manager, you'll lead the team that develops, maintains, and evolves this content across all of our product areas. This role reports to the Chief Product Officer and carries real strategic weight in how Platform24 positions itself clinically.
 



  





**How we work** 




 The combination of clinical experience and technical innovation is one of our greatest strengths, and this role sits right at the intersection. You'll work closely with developers and UX designers every day, translating what patients and clinicians need into what engineers can build. You won't work in a silo; you'll be deeply embedded in the product organisation, connecting medicine and technology across everything you do.
 



  





 A key part of the role is building a working understanding of the logic layer that powers our triage and care content — the rules, decision trees, and clinical reasoning built into the platform. You don't need to be a developer, but you do need to be curious about how that logic works under the hood — able to read it, reason about it, and have constructive conversations about it with the team. This hands-on engagement is what makes people effective in the role.
 



  





**Your role** 



* Set the clinical direction. You'll help shape where our medical content is heading — identifying where it creates or limits value, proposing development priorities, and contributing to how we position ourselves in the market. You'll work closely with the Chief Product Officer (CPO) and Chief Medical Officer (CMO) to keep clinical ambition and the product roadmap aligned.
* Steward medical content across the product. Your team is responsible for medical content across the entire Platform24 product surface: triage flows, Care Plans, Remote Patient Monitoring, and future product areas. You'll prioritize capacity across these areas, balancing customer requests with proactive content development.
* Improve quality through data. Content quality is evaluated continuously. You'll identify and address patterns of under- and overtriage based on outcome and utilization data, and run structured follow-up cycles to make sure improvements stick. Safety comes first — you'll nurture a culture that catches risks early and learns from incidents, in close coordination with our CMO.
* Listen to and support customers. You'll meet customers regularly, listen to their problems, distinguish stated needs from underlying needs, and ensure support requests are handled swiftly. A high level of care and responsiveness is the standard.
* Represent Platform24 externally. This is a visible role within the Nordic digital healthcare ecosystem. You'll represent us in customer meetings, industry webinars, conferences, and sector debates — contributing to our reputation as a clinically credible and trusted partner.
* Build and lead the MedCon team. You're the direct manager: hiring, onboarding, performance conversations, individual goals, and regular feedback. You'll create an environment where clinically trained colleagues can do their best work — with clear documentation, thoughtful onboarding, and routines that help the team focus on what matters.



  





**What you need** 



* Licensed Medical Doctor. This is a clinical leadership role, and medical training is essential.
* Full professional fluency in Swedish. A core part of the role is crafting triage content in Swedish, where the precise wording of both questions and answer options directly affects patient safety. You need to write and reason about clinical language with native-level precision.
* Comfort with data and analysis. You enjoy working with data, drawing conclusions from it, and using it to inform decisions about content quality and priorities.
* Curiosity about technology. You have experience — or a genuine interest — in working closely with software development teams and engaging with technical product logic. You don't need to code, but you want to understand how the system thinks.
* Communication and collaboration skills. You can represent medical content quality credibly in external settings, and you naturally seek input from clinicians, customers, and colleagues. You're someone who brings people together around shared goals.



  





**Nice to have** 



* Experience from digital health, clinical informatics, medical content development, digital transformation, or regulated product environments. Previous experience leading a team is also valued, as is familiarity with decision trees, clinical pathway systems, or logic-based content tools.
* Practical experience of Agile processes



  





**What we offer** 



* Impact at scale: You'll shape the clinical backbone of a platform used by major healthcare regions and providers in Sweden and the Netherlands, as well as in other expanding markets.
* A unique team: Work alongside physicians and other clinical professionals together with engineers and designers in a company where clinical expertise is a genuine part of the culture — not just a talking point.
* Stockholm's most scenic office: Our beautiful location in Münchenbryggeriet offers a stunning view of Riddarfjärden, a strong lunch culture, and a private gym.
* Hybrid work setup: Meet your team in the office 2–3 days per week.
* Culture & balance: Flexible hours, bi-weekly Demo & Beers sessions, and five paid volunteer days per year for causes you care about.



  





**Apply** 




 If this feels like the right role for you, we'd love to hear from you. We review applications on a rolling basis, so don't wait too long.
 



  





 We are an equal-opportunity employer and value diversity. All employment decisions are based on qualifications, merit, and business needs.

title: Client Lead – Fund Operations to Embankment
description:
**Client Lead – Fund Operations to Embankment, Stockholm** 




 On-site with one dedicated client · Team lead role
 



  





*At Embankment, we're redefining how fund services are delivered to the alternative investment industry. Trusted by 75+ AIFMs and 300+ funds across Scandinavia and Luxembourg, we combine deep fund expertise with modern technology to turn complexity into clarity.* 




*We're now looking for an exceptional Client Lead – Fund Operations – someone who wants full ownership of a single, dedicated client relationship. You'll be embedded at the client's office 2–3 days per week, lead a small team of specialists, and become the most trusted person in the room when it comes to their fund operations.* 




*If you love being close to clients, take pride in flawless delivery, and lead by example – this role was built for you.* 




  





**About the role** 




 This is not a traditional service role. As Client Lead, you will have complete end-to-end responsibility for one dedicated client – acting as their primary point of contact and trusted operational partner across all aspects of fund administration and accounting. You will own the relationship, the quality, and the team behind it. You'll be on-site at the client's office 2–3 days a week, deeply embedded in their world. You'll lead a team of two to three specialists at Embankment – motivating them, structuring their work, and ensuring every single deliverable leaves your desk at the highest standard. You are the working leader: hands-on in the detail and accountable for the big picture.
 



 You will develop into the foremost internal expert on your client – knowing their fund structures, investor base, regulatory requirements, and operational nuances better than anyone. You will actively leverage AI tools and digital innovation to continuously raise the quality bar and sharpen how work gets done.
 



  





**Main responsibilities** 




 – End-to-end fund administration for one dedicated client – accounting, drawdowns, distributions, capital calls, NAV calculations and financial reporting
 



 – Act as the client's primary point of contact, present on-site 2–3 days per week, building deep trust and a partnership-level relationship
 



 – Lead and develop a team of 2–3 fund operations specialists – setting direction, structuring workloads, coaching performance, and ensuring perfect deliverables every time
 



 – Become the internal expert on your client – their fund structures, investor base, reporting needs and operational nuances
 



 – Manage and review complex fund processes including NAV reconciliations, waterfall calculations, investor allocations, and regulatory reporting
 



 – Coordinate with Embankment's cross-functional teams on behalf of your client – compliance, legal, AML/KYC, technology and onboarding
 



 – Accounting and reporting for the client's management company and related entities
 



 – Drive continuous improvement – proactively identify opportunities to apply AI, automation, and digital tools to raise efficiency and quality
 



 – Contribute to the broader Embankment team: share expertise, build best practices, and help shape how the firm scales
 



  





**About you** 




 You're a confident, ownership-minded professional with a background in fund operations, fund accounting, or alternative investment administration. You have the expertise to be a true specialist, the instincts to lead a team, and the personality to become your client's most trusted partner. We're looking for someone who combines technical excellence with genuine relationship hunger. You don't just want to deliver good work – you want to be indispensable to your client and exceptional to your team.
 



  





**You bring:** 




 – Extensive experience in fund operations, fund accounting, or alternative investment administration (private equity, venture capital, real estate, or similar)
 



 – A track record of owning complex client relationships or senior operational responsibilities independently
 



 – Deep knowledge of fund accounting: NAV calculations, drawdowns, distributions, waterfalls, investor reporting, and regulatory filings
 



 – Experience leading or mentoring others – you know how to motivate a team, structure their work, and hold quality high
 



 – Proficiency in Excel and familiarity with modern fund administration platforms
 



 – Clear, professional communication – in English and ideally Swedish or Danish
 



  





**You are:** 




 – Genuinely passionate about client relationships – you find energy in being close to the client, not in staying behind the scenes
 



 – A working leader – you motivate, structure and develop your team while staying hands-on in the work yourself
 



 – Obsessed with quality – you take personal pride in perfect deliverables and never cut corners
 



 – An expert in the making – you want to know your client's business inside and out
 



 – Genuinely excited by AI and digital tools – you actively seek smarter ways of working and embrace change
 



 – A developer at heart – committed to growing yourself, your team and the client relationship over time
 



  





**Why Embankment** 




 Embankment is a fast-growing, venture-backed FinTech built from scratch – no legacy systems, no bureaucratic layers. We combine deep fund expertise with modern technology and a team that genuinely enjoys what it does. If you're early in your career and looking for a place where your effort is visible and your development is taken seriously, this is it.
 



 – Real work from day one – not shadowing, not filing, but contributing to live fund operations
 



 – A structured path to grow – clear development from Specialist toward Senior and beyond
 



 – Close collaboration with experienced colleagues who are invested in your progress
 



 – A modern, tech-forward environment with real emphasis on AI and digital ways of working
 



 – A flat, international team across Copenhagen, Stockholm, Oslo, and Luxembourg
 



 – Backed by leading investors, serving 30B+ EUR in assets under administration and growing fast
 



  





**Your application** 




 We are collaborating with Embankment in this recruitment process together with Boardtalk. We look forward to receiving your application as soon as possible, as selection and interviews are conducted on an ongoing basis. All applications and contacts will be treated confidentially. If you have any questions about the position, please feel free to contact the responsible recruitment consultants Martin Andersson +46 70 573 10 10,
 
 martin.andersson@boardtalk.se
 
 , Pauline Mann +46 70 790 05 29,
 
 pauline.mann@boardtalk.se
